name: Norfolk Naval Station
note: Largest naval base in the world. Home port for carrier strike groups.

name: Pearl Harbor
note: US Pacific Fleet HQ. Key logistics hub for Indo-Pacific.

name: Ramstein AB
note: USAFE HQ. Critical airlift node for Middle East operations. Drawdown announced May 1, 2026 — Pentagon to withdraw ~5,000 U.S. troops from Germany over 6-12 months (existing 36,436 → ~30,000+); Ramstein operations continue.

name: Diego Garcia
note: B-2/B-52 staging. Tomahawk launch platform, Indian Ocean.

name: Al Udeid AB
note: CENTCOM forward HQ. Combined Air Ops Center for all sorties.

name: Yokosuka
note: 7th Fleet HQ. Forward-deployed carrier home port.

name: Incirlik AB
note: NATO base, Turkey. Northern approach operations.

name: Camp Lemonnier
note: Djibouti. Only permanent US base in Africa.

name: Bahrain (5th Fleet)
note: 5th Fleet HQ. Direct control of Gulf naval assets.

name: RAF Fairford
note: UK. B-52 forward deployment for CENTCOM operations.

name: Pentagon
note: DoD HQ. Where Operation Epic Fury is commanded.

name: Houston
note: US energy capital. Refinery hub feeling Hormuz closure.
